rag_rules: Place component type assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use visible identifiers and feature names in type-level contracts, avoiding subcomponent ports
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Assumptions and guarantees should reference concrete bounds or named constants when possible
Equation declarations and constant definitions must use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool)
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicit typed ports or constants are available
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for contract clauses
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equation declarations and `const name : type = value;` for constants
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not use AADL property names directly as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Implementation-level bindings and subcomponent port usage
